title: OpenClaw ComfyUI Worker
description: Serverless ComfyUI worker for AI image and video generation with zimg and wan checkpoints. Supports LoRA face consistency, text-to-image, image-to-image, image-to-video, and character animation workflows. Models loaded from network volume.

input.name: Workflow timeout
input.description: Max seconds to wait for a workflow to complete

input.name: HuggingFace Token
input.description: HuggingFace API token for downloading gated models during volume setup

input.name: CivitAI Token
input.description: CivitAI API token for downloading models during volume setup
